creator: count@211.ru
text:
Hi.

You may close this update.
New version of net-mgmt/noc (0.6.4) is out.

On Sun, 10 Apr 2011, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/156304'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
